calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-09-2020 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel
Off Calendar Feb-27-2020 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances.

RULING: Prior to the hearing, the moving party requested to take its motion off calendar because a dismissal of entire action was filed. Therefore,

DEFENDANTS GRV FLOWERS, INC., CAMILO VERGARA's Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel is ordered off calendar at the request of the moving party.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-07-2020 Continued To Apr-29-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Of Plaintiffs Motion For Summary Judgment
Off Calendar Jan-27-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Lisa Meier, Esq. 415-465-1266 specially appearing for Plaintiff.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested/Discussed. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF FRESH WORLD LOGISTICS, INC.'s MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT.

Grant per statement of non-opposition.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details) Plaintiff shall submit a separate judgment.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Jan-13-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: ATTORNEY JAKE A. WALTON, ESQ'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANTS GRV FLOWERS INC. AND CAMILO VERGARA.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court vacates its tentative ruling and rules as follows: At the request of the moving party attorney Mr. Walton per his e-mail sent to the Court this morning, the Court takes ATTORNEY JAKE A. WALTON, ESQ'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANTS GRV FLOWERS INC. AND CAMILO VERGARA off calendar.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano, CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/EPS)
